column1: Juan Soto leads the slate with a strong combination of consistency and matchup, recording a hit in over 91% of games and facing Zack Littell at home with the platoon advantage. Yordan Alvarez also stands out, riding a recent hot streak and a favorable park boost, making him a reliable option near the top. Bobby Witt Jr. and Matt Olson offer steady profiles with advantageous matchups, while Ildemaro Vargas brings perfect recent consistency but sits lower in the order.
